title: schisandra henryi subsp. yunnanensis
intro: Schisandra henryi subsp. yunnanensis, also known as Yunnan schisandra, is a subspecies of the Schisandra henryi plant, a type of woody vine native to the mountains of southwestern China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schisandra henryi subsp. yunnanensis include improved cardiovascular health, immune system function, and liver protection, as well as anti-aging and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Schisandra henryi subsp. yunnanensis can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
